title: UK Hydrographic Office 2024–2025 Annual Report released
body: "The UK Hydrographic Office (UKHO) has published its Annual Report and Accounts for 2024 to 2025.   The report sets out performance against the corporate plan, financial results for the year and governance arrangements. It also includes a sustainability report detailing progress towards Net Zero, and case studies showcasing work to support safe, secure and thriving oceans.   Highlights from the year include:     Strengthening global hydrographic capability through new training programmes and partnerships  Supporting defence operations and Allied missions with critical geospatial intelligence    Advancing innovation in navigation, including preparations for the S100 data framework   Continuing to provide trusted ADMIRALTY products and services to mariners worldwide    The Annual Report and Accounts is available to download here:   UK Hydrographic Office Annual Report and Accounts for 2024 to 2025  (PDF, 8.68 MB, 84 pages)  The UKHO is an executive agency of the Ministry of Defence and a trading fund. It operates as a self funded organisation at no extra cost to the taxpayer. This paper was laid before Parliament in line with a legislative requirement and was ordered to be printed by the House of Commons. "
